title: Writing a discursive essay
explanation:
Writing a discursive essay

A discursive essay examines an issue from several angles before reaching a measured conclusion.

  • Introduction: present the issue clearly.
  • Body: explore arguments fairly.
  • Conclusion: summarise and state your view.

questions.text: [*This essay will examine whether social media does more harm than good.|Social media harm good essay examine.|Essay social media harm good.]
[*One argument in favour is that social media connects isolated communities.|One argument favour social media connects.|Argument social media connects isolated.]
[*On the other hand, excessive use may reduce face-to-face interaction.|Other hand excessive use reduce interaction.|On other hand use excessive.]
[*Overall, the benefits depend on how platforms are used.|Overall benefits depend used platforms.|Benefits overall depend how.]

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: A discursive essay should avoid overly ____ language. | *emotional | formal | precise
Use linkers such as however, therefore and ____.  | *consequently | yesterday | quickly
Each paragraph should develop one clear ____.  | *point | ticket | recipe
The conclusion should summarise the main ____.  | *arguments | ingredients | flights
[*It could be argued that remote work increases productivity.|Could argued remote work productivity increases.|Remote work argued productivity.]
[*Nevertheless, not every job can be done from home.|Nevertheless every job home done.|Not every nevertheless job.]
[*In my view, a hybrid model offers the best balance.|My view hybrid model best balance.|Hybrid model my view.]
[*For instance, employees save commuting time.|For instance employees save commuting.|Instance for employees commuting.]
